<think> The Simpsons is a long-running animated sitcom that has been on the air since 1989. The show has had many seasons, and each season typically has around 20-24 episodes. The show was renewed for its 21st season by Fox, which means that the 21st season was confirmed to be produced. The 17th episode of any season would be a specific episode within that season. To find the air date of the 17th episode of the 21st season, I would need to know the specific episode title or a more detailed description of the episode. However, I can try to find the general information about the 21st season of The Simpsons. The 21st season of The Simpsons premiered on September 27, 2009, and the season finale aired on May 23, 2010. Given that the 17th episode would likely air sometime in the spring of 2010, I can try to find the exact air date. After searching, I found that the 17th episode of the 21st season of The Simpsons is titled "Four Great Women and a Manicure" and it aired on April 18, 2010. </think>
<answer> April 18, 2010 </answer>
